P

parseInput(String) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputParser
Parses a raw input string into a Command instance.
parseVec2(String) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputParser
 
PAUSE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Pause or resume the simulation.
PauseCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command toggling the paused state of the simulation.
PauseCommand() - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.PauseCommand
Creates an instance of a PauseCommand record class.
PLASTER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.grid.Material
 
position() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.AddEntityCommand
Returns the value of the position record component.
position() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.ClearEntitiesCommand
Returns the value of the position record component.
position() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.RemoveEntityCommand
Returns the value of the position record component.
position() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.SetMaterialCommand
Returns the value of the position record component.
printSimulation() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.ConsoleRenderSystem
Prints the current simulation state to the console.
printSomething(String) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.ConsoleRenderSystem
Prints a message to the console without clearing the terminal first.
printSomething(String, boolean) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.ConsoleRenderSystem
Prints a message to the console for debugging purposes.
propagateTo(Cell) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanPropagate
Propagate this object to the specified target cell.
propagateTo(Cell) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.AxialMold1
Propagates this mold to the given target cell by adding a new AxialMold1 instance to that cell.
propagateTo(Cell) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.CircMold1
Propagates this mold to the given target cell by adding a new CircMold1 instance.
propagateTo(Cell) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.DividedMold1
Propagates this mold to the specified target cell.
propagation(Vec2, CanPropagate) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.PropagationSystem
Attempts to propagate the provided canPropagate entity from the original coordinates to a selected target cell following the entity's propagation distribution and probability.
PropagationSystem - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems
Responsible for selecting propagation targets and performing propagation actions for CanPropagate entities.
PropagationSystem(SimulationState) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.PropagationSystem
 
ProximalMold - Class in com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold
An abstract mold whose propagation targets are the immediate neighbours (Manhattan distance 1 or 2).
ProximalMold(int, int, int, double, Entities, double, double) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.ProximalMold
Constructs a ProximalMold with the specified growth parameters and entity type.
publishedState - Static variable in class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain
Published simulation state so other parts of the app can access the running simulation when ConsoleMain is started programmatically.
